div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: cost to climb: edit one JSON file

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: cost: run the same binary as a server

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: cost: point more sessions at it

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rung 0 - wrap what you already run
fak guard -- claude
gain: embedded default-deny floor, exit summary of every verdict,
429 absorption - on your existing subscription

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rung 1 - own the floor
fak policy --dump then edit, fak policy --check
gain: the allow-list is a reviewed JSON file in YOUR git,
checkable offline with no model and no key

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rung 2 - turn on the record
FAK_AUDIT_JOURNAL=audit.jsonl, --log FILE, GET /metrics
gain: a hash-chained decision trail an auditor re-verifies,
plus Prometheus counters per verdict

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rung 3 - front your own stack
fak serve --base-url (production checklist) or serve --stdio (MCP)
or --gguf (local model in-kernel)
gain: the same floor for every client of your endpoint

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rung 4 - fleet and referee
many sessions over one boundary
gain: per-trace metrics across agents, and claim verification
from artifacts instead of worker self-reports

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Each rung adds a witness, not a rewrite.
Stop at any rung: the binary and the policy
keep the same shape underneath you.
